en_title: A Week After Revealing Its New Game, Hellblade Studio Ninja Theory Is Reportedly Under Threat of Closure by Microsoft
cn_title: 新作公布一周后，《地狱之刃》工作室Ninja Theory据称面临微软关闭威胁
subtitle: Xbox大洗牌
opus_summary: 微软削减Xbox业务，彭博社称Ninja Theory与Double Fine等多家工作室正为存亡而战，部分与微软谈判寻求独立。新Xbox负责人警告公司「重置」，微软游戏业务利润率仅3%，预计6月底裁员。

paragraphs.en: Hellblade developer Ninja Theory and Psychonauts developer Double Fine are reportedly among the studios fighting to avoid closure as Microsoft makes significant cuts to the Xbox business.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，随着微软对Xbox业务进行重大削减，《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory与《意航员》开发商Double Fine等工作室正在为避免关闭而奋战。

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg reported that Compulsion, Ninja Theory, and Double Fine are all negotiating with Microsoft to potentially go independent, although doing so would still likely result in significant layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社报道称，Compulsion、Ninja Theory和Double Fine都在与微软谈判，可能寻求独立，但即便独立也很可能仍会引发大规模裁员。

paragraphs.en: Earlier today, The Game Business reported that Xbox Game Studios boss Craig Duncan had stepped down, then Kotaku reported that South of Midnight developer Compulsion was under threat of closure. Now, Bloomberg is reporting that pretty much all Microsoft-owned studios are concerned about what happens next, with Ninja Theory and Double Fine named as being in talks with their parent company.
paragraphs.cn: 今天早些时候，The Game Business报道Xbox Game Studios负责人Craig Duncan已离职，随后Kotaku报道《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion面临关闭威胁。现在彭博社又称，几乎所有微软旗下工作室都忧心于下一步走向，其中Ninja Theory和Double Fine被点名正与母公司协商。

paragraphs.en: Just last week, new Xbox boss Asha Sharma warned of a company "reset" that most took as a signal that Microsoft planned big layoffs and studio closures. "the studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet." Microsoft was then said to be speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as it considered restructuring or even spinning off its gaming branch.
paragraphs.cn: 就在上周，新任Xbox负责人Asha Sharma警告公司即将「重置」，多数人将此解读为微软计划大规模裁员和关闭工作室的信号。有评论称：「那些最受影响的工作室，在声名上卓著，在财务上却一团糟。」随后有消息称，微软正加速开发新的《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏，同时考虑重组甚至剥离其游戏部门。

paragraphs.en: UK studio Ninja Theory is behind the technically impressive Hellblade franchise, which has struggled for commercial success. The developer announced sequel Senua just over a week ago at the Xbox Games Showcase reveal event. It is unclear what will happen to the game now. Earlier this year Double Fine, which is behind the Psychonauts franchise, released online multiplayer pottery party brawler Kiln. Like Double Fine's 2025 effort, Keeper, Kiln failed to make an impression.
paragraphs.cn: 英国工作室Ninja Theory打造了技术表现亮眼的《地狱之刃》系列，但该系列在商业上一直遭遇困难。仅仅一周多前，该开发商才在Xbox游戏展示会上公布了续作《塞娜》，目前该项目的命运尚不明朗。今年早些时候，曾推出《意航员》系列的Double Fine发布了线上多人陶艺派对乱斗游戏《Kiln》。与Double Fine 2025年的作品《Keeper》一样，《Kiln》也未能在市场上激起水花。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's ground-shaking memo revealed that Microsoft's gaming business currently has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那份震动全公司的备忘录透露，微软游戏业务目前的「可问责利润率」（据信指利润率）仅为3%，且同比下滑。Sharma写道：「如果不计动视暴雪King，过去五年我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上累计投入超过200亿美元(约合人民币1352亿元)，但年收入却在此期间减少了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。这种情况不能再继续下去了。」

paragraphs.en: Following the release of the memo, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said "there's more monetization of Xbox games happening on YouTube" than at Xbox , adding that the Xbox team needed to figure out how to "innovate both in hardware, as well as in the games, going forward in an economically viable way."
paragraphs.cn: 这份备忘录发布后，微软CEO萨蒂亚·纳德拉表示，「在YouTube上发生的Xbox游戏变现」比在Xbox本身还要多，并补充说Xbox团队需要找到方法，「在硬件和游戏方面同时进行创新，以经济上可持续的方式前进」。

paragraphs.en: "No one can accuse Microsoft of not having invested for the last 25 years," Nadella added. "Now, we have to turn this into a sustainable business that delivers what is fundamentally one of the best sources of entertainment, still."
paragraphs.cn: 纳德拉还称：「没人能指责微软在过去25年里没有投入。现在，我们必须把这打造成一个可持续的业务，它本质上仍然是最好的娱乐来源之一。」

paragraphs.en: Today's news marks a significant U-turn on Xbox brand sentiment, after Sharma had started to turn core fans around with a number of crowd-pleasing changes such as the decision to make The Coalition's Gears of War: E-Day and inXile's Clockworld Revolution console exclusives. The Xbox layoffs are expected to come into effect at the end of Microsoft's financial year on June 30.
paragraphs.cn: 今天的消息使得Xbox品牌舆情发生重大转向，此前Sharma刚通过一系列讨好玩家的举措开始拉拢核心粉丝，比如让The Coalition的《战争机器：事变日》和inXile的《Clockworld Revolution》成为主机独占作品。据悉Xbox裁员预计将在微软财年结束时——即6月30日——生效。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监，你可以在Twitter上@wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，保密方式可发至wyp100@proton.me。
